text.tspan: LLM apps fail silently. The model says something wrong with confidence.
Without observability, you find out from user complaints, days later.
Observability for LLMs has unique axes beyond traditional APM.

g.text: What to instrument (per call AND per session)

text.tspan: Braintrust - eval-first; great for prompt experimentation
Weights & Biases Weave - traditional MLOps + LLM tracing
OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions - standard schema
Most tools support OpenTelemetry GenAI now,
- Debugging: WHY did the agent do that? Replay the trace.
- Cost: which prompt/model is the cost driver?
- Quality: how does prod traffic score vs eval set?
- Drift: are users asking different things over time?
- Regression detection: did a new release degrade?
